+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: Graceful shutdown is not working for async server",
+    "description": "Graceful shutdown is not working for async server. This issue affects 14+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?\n1.37\n\n### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?\nmacOS Cataline 10.15.7\n\n### What runtime / compiler are you using (e.g."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Graceful shutdown is not working for async server",
+        "description": "`KeyboardInterrupt` exception will not be propagated into individual coroutines, instead it will be raised in the `asyncio.run` or `loop.run_until_complete` lines. This means my previous graceful shutdown example won't work, as reported in https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/26123.\n\nThere are 2\n```yaml\nimport logging\nimport asyncio\nimport grpc\n\n\nasync def serve() -> None:\n    server = grpc.aio.server()\n    listen_addr = \"[::]:50051\"\n    server.add_insecure_port(listen_addr)\n    logging.info(\"Starting server on %s\", listen_addr)\n    await server.start()\n    try:\n        await server.wait_for_termination()\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        # Shuts down the server with 0 seconds of grace period. During the\n        # grace period, the server won't accept new connections and allow\n        # existing RPCs to continue within the grace period.\n        await server.stop(0)\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__mai\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Graceful shutdown is not working for async server is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "`KeyboardInterrupt` exception will not be propagated into individual coroutines, instead it will be raised in the `asyncio.run` or `loop.run_until_complete` lines. This means my previous graceful shutdown example won't work, as reported in https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/26123.\n\nThere are 2 ways to clear-up for `KeyboardInterrupt` in asyncio:\n\n1. Signal handlers;\n2.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "import logging\nimport asyncio\nimport grpc\n\n\nasync def serve() -> None:\n    server = grpc.aio.server()\n    listen_addr = \"[::]:50051\"\n    server.add_insecure_port(listen_addr)\n    logging.info(\"Starting server on %s\", listen_addr)\n    await server.start()\n    try:\n        await server.wait_for_termination()\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\n        # Shuts down the server with 0 seconds of grace period. During the\n        # grace period, the server won't accept new connections and allow\n        # existing RPCs to continue within the grace period.\n        await server.stop(0)\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)\n    asyncio.run(serve())",
+        "/Users/ilian/.virtualenvs/usersettings-service/bin/python /Users/ilian/workspace/lifesum/usersettings-service/tmp.py\nINFO:root:Starting server on [::]:50051\nTraceback (most recent call last):\n  File \"/Users/ilian/workspace/lifesum/usersettings-service/tmp.py\", line 38, in <module>\n    asyncio.run(serve())\n  File \"/Users/ilian/.pyenv/versions/3.9.0/lib/python3.9/asyncio/runners.py\", line 44, in run\n    return loop.run_until_complete(main)\n  File \"/Users/ilian/.pyenv/versions/3.9.0/lib/python3.9/asyncio/base_events.py\", line 629, in run_until_complete\n    self.run_forever()\n  File \"/Users/ilian/.pyenv/versions/3.9.0/lib/python3.9/asyncio/base_events.py\", line 596, in run_forever\n    self._run_once()\n  File \"/Users/ilian/.pyenv/versions/3.9.0/lib/python3.9/asyncio/base_events.py\", line 1854, ",
+        "# Terminal 1\n$ python3 async_greeter_server_with_graceful_shutdown.py"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
